focus: src/lib export surface, re-exports, barrel files

findings.title: Remove unnecessary re-exports from src/lib/index.ts (direct imports preferred)

proposal.reason: Consumers already import from src/lib; barrel file adds indirection

acceptance: No re-exports in index.ts, direct imports used

findings.title: Move all TypeScript interfaces to src/lib/types.ts (scattered across modules)

proposal.gather: NodeSpec, Graph, ValidationRule, Orientation, RoadmapError, etc.

acceptance: All types in types.ts, implementations reference from there

notes: Export surface can be significantly reduced through consolidation.
